title: Connect to LSEG/Refinitiv Eikon and DataStream from R
text: RefinitivR R interface LSEG Workspace (formerly Refinitiv Eikon) Refinitiv DataStream. Just load go — package auto-detects running terminal connects first API call. API key, setup code, connection objects manage. Repeated requests can served opt-session-scoped cache configurable TTLs. Snapshot & historical data — rd_GetData(), rd_GetHistory(), rd_GetHistoricalPricing() Real-time streaming — WebSocket-based live market data callbacks ESG, estimates & ownership — rd_GetESG(), rd_GetEstimates(), rd_GetOwnership() News & search — headlines, stories, top news, discovery search Custom instruments — create, update, delete basket formula instruments DataStream — via DatastreamDSWS2R Robust hood — three-layer retry exponential backoff, automatic chunking, HTTP 429/503 handling, progress reporting large requests Note (v0.2.0): Python/reticulate support removed. data retrieval now uses JSON API exclusively. See NEWS.md details. package way affiliated Thomson Reuters, Refinitiv, Eikon, Datastream, LSEG. subscription Eikon/LSEG Workspace /Datastream required. Use risk!

text: data retrieval functions support opt-session-scoped caching avoid redundant API calls: Caching purely -memory scoped current R session — restarting R calling rd_ClearCache() wipes cached results.
code: # Enable caching globally (uses per-function default TTLs, typically 300 s) options(refinitiv_cache = TRUE)  # Or enable per call rd_GetData(rics = "AAPL.O", Eikonformulas = "TR.CompanyName", cache = TRUE)  # Custom TTL (seconds) rd_GetHistory(universe = "AAPL.O", cache = 600)  # Inspect and clear rd_CacheInfo() rd_ClearCache()

title: Connect to LSEG/Refinitiv Eikon and DataStream from R
text: Multi-chunk requests (large instrument universes, multi-query news, etc.) automatically show compact progress messages: Single-instrument requests stay silent (one-chunk rule). Server-side polling retriable errors always report status regardless mode. Control progress output options(refinitiv_progress = ...) REFINITIV_PROGRESS environment variable .Renviron: output uses message(), suppressMessages() works expected.

code: library(shiny) library(Refinitiv)  stream <- rd_get_streaming_data(universe = "EUR=", fields = c("BID", "ASK")) stream$open()  ui <- fluidPage(   titlePanel("Custom Live Stream"),   plotOutput("live_plot"),   verbatimTextOutput("stats") )  server <- function(input, output, session) {   output$live_plot <- renderPlot({     invalidateLater(1000, session)     history <- stream$get_data_history()     if (nrow(history) > 0) {       plot(history$timestamp, history$BID,             type = "l", xlab = "Time", ylab = "BID",            main = "EUR/USD Bid Price")     }   })      output$stats <- renderText({     latest <- stream$get_latest_data("EUR=")     paste("Latest BID:", latest$BID)   }) }  shinyApp(ui, server)

code: EikonGetData(   EikonObject = rd_connection(),   rics,   Eikonformulas,   Parameters = NULL,   raw_output = FALSE,   time_out = 60,   verbose = getOption("refinitiv_progress", TRUE),   SpaceConvertor = ".",   cache = NULL )

title: Function to obtain data from Eikon via the JSON API — EikonGetData
text: EikonObject Eikon connection object. Defaults rd_connection(), auto-creates connection first use. rics vector containing instrument RICS Eikonformulas vector containing character string Eikon Formulas Parameters named key value list setting parameters, Default: NULL raw_output return raw list chunk debugging purposes, default = FALSE time_out set maximum timeout Eikon server, default = 60 verbose boolean, set TRUE print API call details time stamp debugging. SpaceConvertor converts spaces variables name one following characters ".", "," , "-", "_", default "." cache Controls caching. NULL (default) defers getOption("refinitiv_cache", FALSE). TRUE uses function default TTL (300 s). FALSE disables caching. positive numeric value sets cache TTL seconds. See rd_ClearCache.

Initial value financial year range (e.g. 2020). end Optional integer. End value financial year range (e.g. 2023). use_field_names_in_headers Logical. TRUE (default), column names come API's title field; FALSE, internal name field. raw_output Logical. TRUE, returns raw parsed JSON list instead data.frame. debug Logical. TRUE, prints debug messages. cache Controls caching. NULL (default) defers getOption("refinitiv_cache", FALSE). TRUE uses function default TTL (300 s). Defaults RefinitivJsonConnect() supplied. universe Character vector instrument codes (RICs, PermIDs, etc.). view Character string selecting ownership view. Default "consolidated/breakdown". title: Retrieve News Headlines from a Refinitiv RDP (JSON) Connection — rd_get_news_headlines
text: query parameters may include various tokens Reuters Instrument Codes (RIC), language codes, explicit free-text tokens (using quotes), date ranges. addition, function supports pagination via cursor. Examples queries include: Explicit FreeText (use quotes) rd_get_news_headlines(query = "\"electric car\" \"electric vehicle\"") SearchIn token (HeadlineOnly) rd_get_news_headlines(query = "\"Reports\" \"Announces\" searchIn:HeadlineOnly") SearchIn token (FullStory) rd_get_news_headlines(query = "\"inflation\" searchIn:FullStory") Language Filter French: rd_get_news_headlines(query = "LFR");     English: rd_get_news_headlines(query = "L:EN") Reuters Instrument Code (RIC) rd_get_news_headlines(query = "MSFT.O") RIC + Relevancy rd_get_news_headlines(query = "MSFT.O", relevancy = "High") Company Name + RIC + Relevancy rd_get_news_headlines(query = "LEN \"Microsoft\" MSFT.O", relevancy = "High") Read News (M:1RS) rd_get_news_headlines(query = "M:1RS") Newswire Specific RCS Codes rd_get_news_headlines(query = "MRG") Explicit Token News Source (NS) rd_get_news_headlines(query = "NS:RTRS NS:PRN NS:TWTR") Increasing Limit rd_get_news_headlines(query = "\"stock repurchase\"", limit = 50) Pagination using Cursor rd_get_news_headlines(query = "MSFT.O", cursor = "H4sIAAAAAAAA...", limit = 10) Daterange using LAST syntax rd_get_news_headlines(query = "MRG last 5 days") Daterange syntax rd_get_news_headlines(query = "M:1RS 2024-03 2024-04") Daterange explicit /rd_get_news_headlines(query = "Major breaking news",       dateFrom = "2024-04-13T00:00:00Z", dateTo = "2024-04-14T00:00:00Z") Note: parameter limit must exceed 100. value greater 100 provided, function throw error. raw_output = TRUE, list raw JSON responses returned.

title: Retrieve Full News Story from a Refinitiv RDP (JSON) Connection — rd_get_news_story

title: Retrieve Top News Packages from a Refinitiv RDP (JSON) Connection, Then Fetch Stories — rd_get_top_news
text: Overview Top News Groups Pages: Main Pages "Front Page", "Central Banks & Global Economy",     "Sustainable Finance", "World News", "Regulation & Compliance". Breakingviews Generally contains page "Reuters Breakingviews". Banking & Finance Pages like "Financial Services", "Investment Banking",     "IFR", "Digital Finance & Crypto". Markets Pages "Global Markets", "Foreign Exchange",     "Fixed Income", "Emerging Markets", "IFR". Commodities Pages like "Commodities", "Energy", "Metals",     "Agricultural Commodities", "Global Gas, Power & LNG". Industries Pages "Technology, Media & Telecoms",     "Heavy Industry & Transport", "Consumer & Retail", "Healthcare & Pharma". Companies Sub-groups "U.S. Companies", "European Companies",     "Asian Companies". Regional Pages "Australia & New Zealand", "Japan & Koreas",     "Greater China", "Southeast Asia", "India & South Asia", "Middle East & Africa",     "Europe & Russia", "United Kingdom", "Latin America", "United States", "Canada". National Languages News various languages including Japanese, Chinese,     German, French, Portuguese, Russian top news. Sports & Lifestyle Pages like "Sport" "Lifestyle & Entertainment". AWP Top News Pages "AWP German Top News" "AWP French Top News". addition returning key fields top news packages (group, page name, revision information, topNewsId), function makes additional GET call page calling /data/news/v1/top-news/<topNewsId>. call retrieves actual story details including story identifier (storyId), title (text), summary (snippet) can subsequently used rd_get_news_story.

title: Retry a function call with exponential backoff — retry
text: fn zero-argument function execute. Wrap call function() your_call() passing. max_attempts Maximum number attempts (including first). Defaults getOption("refinitiv_max_retries", 2L). backoff Initial backoff time seconds. Doubles failure, default = 0.5. on_failure attempts exhausted. "stop" (default) throws error containing last failure message. "NA" issues warning returns NA — use inside chunked_download() per-chunk success tracked externally.

title: Retry a function call with exponential backoff — retry
text: return value fn() success.

title: Retry a function call with exponential backoff — retry
text: retry() client-side retry layer. guards transient network errors unexpected exceptions. Inside chunked_download(): Use retry(fn, max_attempts = 1L, on_failure = "NA") retry() acts solely error--NA converter. coordinator owns full retry lifecycle (jittered exponential backoff rounds, per-chunk tracking). Standalone callers (e.g., rd_GetESG): Use default max_attempts (configure via refinitiv_max_retries option) direct retrying exponential backoff. distinct two retry/polling mechanisms package: httr2::req_retry() inside     send_json_request() handles HTTP-level transient errors     (429 Many Requests, 503 Service Unavailable) transparently     httr2::req_perform(). server polling loop send_json_request()     handles LSEG-specific JSON responses: async ticket/estimated-duration     polling retriable error codes (2504, 500, 400).
